title: Tails wagging in waiting at Odin
description: GEORGE NEWS - Odin is a passionate...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Odin is a passionate non-profit dedicated to educating pet owners and helping lovable dogs, cats, puppies, and kittens find their perfect match.


> Their premises are alive with wagging tails and hopeful hearts. This is where animals wait to meet their forever families.


To find out more, adopt a pet, or get involved, contact Colleen Smith at 072 084 1374.

Coal is a great loyal companion who is eager to please.

Bella is a gorgeous retriever cross at her peak.

Wayne is the most charming pirate in town. He is a well-socialised and well-behaved all-rounder of about three to four years old.

Ginger is a sweet, mature little man. He is very well behaved and will be a pleasure in his forever home.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
